issues.description: Uses deprecated python-jose library instead of PyJWT. python-jose has security vulnerabilities (CVE-2024-33663) and is no longer recommended.
issues.webResearchNote: CVE-2024-33663 is an algorithm confusion vulnerability in python-jose. The FastAPI community and security advisories recommend using PyJWT instead. See: https://www.sentinelone.com/vulnerability-database/cve-2024-33663/

issues.description: Uses deprecated datetime.utcnow() which is deprecated in Python 3.12. Should use datetime.now(timezone.utc).
issues.webResearchNote: Python 3.12 deprecated datetime.utcnow() and utcfromtimestamp(). The recommended replacement is datetime.now(timezone.utc) per PEP 696 and Python 3.12 release notes.

issues.description: Uses hashlib.pbkdf2_hmac directly instead of recommended passlib. While functional, passlib provides better abstraction and security defaults.
issues.webResearchNote: While passlib has maintenance concerns with bcrypt 5.0+, it remains the recommended abstraction for password hashing in Python education. Using raw hashlib requires careful parameter tuning.
